## What this changes

Brief description of the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] No runtime dependencies added (standard library only)
- [ ] No `data/raw/` files renamed or edited
- [ ] Generated files (`*.md`, `errors_master.csv`, `*.tsv`) were regenerated via scripts, not hand-edited
- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests` passes
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate.py` passes
- [ ] `git status --short data/` shows no changes to data sources
- [ ] Docs (README / CLAUDE.md) updated if behavior or commands changed
